title: microsorum samarense
intro: Microsorum samarense, also known as Java fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a non-vascular, terrestrial fern that is native to Southeast Asia, and is commonly used in aquariums and water gardens due to its ability to thrive in low-light conditions. Microsorum samarense is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and ointments, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve overall well-being.
